name: Amocha Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot coffee over the finely chopped nuts and let cool.
2. Add 2 teaspoons cocoa to the cooled nut mixture.
3. Beat egg whites with salt until they form soft peaks.
4. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Whisk yolks well, then add the remaining sugar, beating until thick.
6. Mix in the coffee and nut mixture into the yolk mixture, blending well.
7. Sift together the cake meal and potato starch, then fold into the batter.
8. Pour the batter into a tube pan and bake at 325°F for 1 hour or longer.
